design_system_profile.visual_style: A modern, floating, fully-rounded top navigation bar that sits distinctly above the page content. It features a clean, high-contrast aesthetic with soft internal padding and pill-shaped interactive elements.

center.elements: Group of individual pill-shaped links with icons and text

right.elements: Split button: Primary text pill + Secondary circular icon

cursor_ai_directives.mandatory_instruction: Before writing the final code, you MUST pause and ask the user about the background context.
cursor_ai_directives.question_to_ask: What will be behind the border of this floating header? (e.g., A solid light color, a dark hero image, a video, or a colorful gradient?)

recommendation_engine.if_user_says_image_or_video: Recommend changing the 'header_container_bg' to rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) and adding a CSS backdrop-blur (glassmorphism) so the header blends beautifully with the media behind it.
recommendation_engine.if_user_says_solid_light_color: Recommend keeping the solid white background but slightly increasing the drop shadow to ensure it 'pops' off the page.
recommendation_engine.if_user_says_dark_color: Recommend a 'Dark Mode' inversion of the header (dark gray pill, white text) so it doesn't clash aggressively with the dark background.
recommendation_engine.scroll_behavior: Also recommend whether the header should stay fixed on scroll or fade out.
